tests.description: elapsedTime is deterministic under a fake clock: 65s advanced reads as '1m 5s'.
now() - start is exact under a fake clock; elapsedTime is the legible layer over it.
elapsedTime.partial(since: start) is a valid zero-argument tool the model can call; the tool executes and returns '1m 30s' into the thread, and the model answers 'checked'.
